data.title: Nkarta Launches $100 Million At-the-Market Stock Offering
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from Nkarta ( (NKTX) ).

On March 25, 2026, Nkarta, Inc. entered into a Sales Agreement with Stifel, Nicolaus & Company for an at-the-market equity offering of up to $100 million of its common stock, with Stifel acting as sales agent and earning a commission of up to 3% on gross sales proceeds. The shares will be sold from time to time at Nkarta’s discretion under a Form S-3 shelf registration and related prospectus supplement filed the same day with the SEC, providing the company with flexible access to capital while the agreement remains in effect until all shares are sold or the arrangement is otherwise terminated.

Under the terms of the arrangement, Nkarta controls key parameters of each sale, including timing, volume limits per trading day and minimum price thresholds, and sales may be executed on Nasdaq, other trading markets, over-the-counter or via privately negotiated transactions. The structure gives Nkarta a mechanism to raise funding opportunistically in the market to support its business needs, with customary indemnification protections provided to the agent and a legal opinion from O’Melveny & Myers LLP confirming the validity of the shares to be issued.

The most recent analyst rating on (NKTX) stock is a Hold with a $2.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Nkarta stock, see the NKTX Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on NKTX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, NKTX is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance (no revenue, ongoing losses, and significant cash burn), with additional pressure from bearish technical indicators. Valuation provides limited support because negative earnings make P/E less informative and there is no dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on NKTX stock, click here.

More about Nkarta

Nkarta, Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company focused on developing cell-based therapies, with its primary activities centered on researching and advancing treatments that leverage engineered immune cells. The company is listed on the Nasdaq Global Select Market and accesses public equity markets as a key component of its capital-raising strategy to fund ongoing operations and clinical development programs.

Average Trading Volume: 759,966

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $151.3M

data.title: American Strategic Investment Reschedules 2025 Earnings Release Date
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

New York City REIT ( (NYC) ) just unveiled an update.

American Strategic Investment Co., which trades on the NYSE as NYC, is a commercial real estate owner focused on properties across the five boroughs of New York City. Its portfolio centers on income-generating assets in this major metropolitan market, positioning the company within the city’s office and broader commercial property landscape.

On March 25, 2026, American Strategic Investment Co. announced it had rescheduled the release of its fourth quarter and full-year 2025 results to April 14, 2026. The delay is intended to provide additional time to complete customary year-end reporting, internal reviews, and the finalization of its Form 10-K with its newly appointed independent auditor, signaling a heightened focus on audit and reporting rigor for investors and other stakeholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (NYC) stock is a Sell with a $9.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on New York City REIT stock, see the NYC Stock Forecast page.

To see Spark’s full report on NYC stock, click here.

data.title: Braskem Calls April 27 Digital EGM to Amend Bylaws and Move Domicile to São Paulo
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Braskem SA ( (BAK) ) has shared an update.

Braskem has called an extraordinary general meeting for April 27, 2026, to be held exclusively in digital format via Webex, as part of its ongoing adherence to Brazilian corporate governance rules for listed companies. The meeting will address changes to the company’s bylaws, including updating its legal domicile to São Paulo and aligning procedures with rules for digital shareholder participation under CVM Resolution 81.

Shareholders are being asked to vote on enhanced rules for replacing board members in case of vacancies and the inclusion of an arbitration clause in the bylaws, with a subsequent consolidation and renumbering of the bylaw text. The company has also detailed documentation and access requirements for remote participation and voting, signaling a continued shift toward fully digital governance processes that may streamline engagement for both Brazilian and foreign investors.

The most recent analyst rating on (BAK) stock is a Hold with a $3.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Braskem SA stock, see the BAK Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on BAK Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BAK is a Neutral.

Braskem SA’s overall stock score reflects significant financial challenges, with high leverage and declining profitability being the most critical factors. While there are some positive aspects, such as improved EBITDA and liquidity, these are overshadowed by ongoing industry pressures and valuation concerns. Technical analysis provides a neutral outlook, with mixed signals on momentum.

To see Spark’s full report on BAK stock, click here.

More about Braskem SA

Braskem S.A. is a publicly held Brazilian petrochemical company, operating large industrial complexes such as the Camaçari hub in Bahia and supplying resins and other petrochemical products to domestic and international markets. The group is listed in Brazil and the United States, falling under the disclosure and governance standards applicable to foreign private issuers in the U.S. capital markets.

Average Trading Volume: 2,242,521

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: $1.53B

Find detailed analytics on BAK stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
